languages.text: Эти огромные агрокомплексы обеспечивают миллиарды подданных Империума провизией — невкусной, но питательной.

traits.locale_text: Эти огромные агрокомплексы обеспечивают провизией миллиарды ртов в Империуме — невкусной, но питательной.
Эти огромные агрокомплексы обеспечивают миллиарды подданных Империума провизией — невкусной, но питательной.

languages.text: These enormous industrial farms provide billions of Imperial subjects with sustenance. It may taste awful, but it's nutritious.
languages.original_text: Эти огромные агрокомплексы обеспечивают миллиарды подданных Империума провизией — невкусной, но питательной.

traits.locale_text: These giant industrial farms provide billions of Imperial citizens with sustenance. It tastes awful, but it's good for you.
These giant industrial farms provide billions of Imperial citizens with sustenance. It tastes awful, but it's good for you.
These enormous industrial farms provide billions of Imperial subjects with sustenance. It may taste awful, but it's nutritious.
These enormous industrial farms provide billions of Imperial subjects with sustenance. It may taste awful, but it's nutritious.
These enormous industrial farms provide billions of Imperial subjects with sustenance. It may taste awful, but it's nutritious.
These enormous industrial farms provide billions of Imperial subjects with sustenance. It may taste awful, but it's nutritious.

languages.text: Diese riesigen Industriebetriebe versorgen Milliarden von imperialen Untertanen mit Lebensmitteln. Es mag furchtbar schmecken, aber es ist nahrhaft.
languages.original_text: These enormous industrial farms provide billions of Imperial subjects with sustenance. It may taste awful, but it's nutritious.

traits.locale_text: Diese riesigen Industriebetriebe versorgen Milliarden von imperialen Untertanen mit Lebensmitteln. Es mag furchtbar schmecken, aber es ist nahrhaft.

languages.text: Ces gigantesques fermes industrielles assurent la subsistance de milliards de sujets impériaux. C'est peut-être affreux, mais c'est nourrissant.
languages.original_text: These enormous industrial farms provide billions of Imperial subjects with sustenance. It may taste awful, but it's nutritious.

traits.locale_text: Ces gigantesques fermes industrielles assurent la subsistance de milliards de sujets impériaux. C'est peut-être affreux, mais c'est nourrissant.

languages.text: Estas enormes granjas industriales proporcionan sustento a miles de millones de súbditos imperiales. Puede que sepa horrible, pero es nutritivo.
languages.original_text: These enormous industrial farms provide billions of Imperial subjects with sustenance. It may taste awful, but it's nutritious.

traits.locale_text: Estas enormes granjas industriales proporcionan sustento a miles de millones de súbditos imperiales. Puede que sepa horrible, pero es nutritivo.

languages.text: Bu devasa endüstriyel çiftlikler milyarlarca İmparatorluk tebaasına besin sağlıyor. Tadı berbat olabilir ama besleyicidir.
